case_title: PARKMECED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP vs. HENDRICKS, CECIL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMECED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT HENDRICKS, CECIL NIEVES, FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMECED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENDRICKS, CECIL NIEVES, FRANCISCO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 405 SERRANO #12L $5,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
